export.header: NoteSentry conversation export (data stays on this device)
export.footer: Exported by NoteSentry. All data is local; please handle it per the PhysioNet DUA.

error.ollamaNotLocal: Ollama address {{host}} is not local. To keep data on-device, only localhost / 127.0.0.1 are allowed.
error.ollamaBlocked: Ollama address is not local and was blocked.
error.toolServerNotFound: Cannot find the MCP server for tool {{name}}, or it is not connected.
